meaning: n.白人与半白人之混血儿,(黑人血统占)四分之一的混血儿
examples: She always dressed in black and white clothing. She used elderberry and gooseberry perfumes. She had purple eyes and raven black hair. She was a quadroon (she had1/4 of elven blood).
Would saving affirmative action require the resurrection of discredited terms like quadroon and octoroon?
